summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Intelligence Layer Batch A implementation. All 6 backend intelligence endpoints working correctly with 95.8% backend success rate. Frontend intelligence pages load properly with navigation, widgets, and filtering functionality working. New intelligence navigation items successfully added to sidebar.

minor_issues.issue: Transfer validation allows same source/destination store and doesn't enforce strict quantity limits
minor_issues.impact: Minor validation bypass in transfer creation

passed_tests: Backend GET /api/intel/dashboard returns inventory/customer/operations metrics with correct structure
Backend GET /api/intel/demand-forecast returns product forecasts with reorder quantities and urgency levels
Backend GET /api/intel/expiry-risk returns expiry items grouped by 30d/60d/90d time periods
Backend GET /api/intel/redistribution returns dead stock transfer suggestions with recoverable value
Backend POST /api/intel/auto-tasks generates CRM tasks for due/overdue medications
Backend GET /api/intel/auto-task-queue returns today's generated task queue
Intelligence Dashboard page loads with 3 main sections (Inventory, Customer, Operations)
Intelligence Dashboard displays 9 KPI widgets across 3 sections
Intelligence widgets are clickable and navigate to appropriate detail pages
Demand Forecast page shows products with sales data, reorder quantities, and urgency badges
Demand Forecast page includes store and period filter dropdowns
Expiry Risk page shows risk summary cards (30d/60d/90d) and filterable table
Expiry Risk page includes risk level filter buttons (All, 30d, 60d, 90d)
Navigation sidebar includes Intelligence, Forecast, Expiry Risk menu items
Generate CRM Tasks button functional and triggers API call
All intelligence pages accessible via direct URL navigation
Models updated with expiry_date column support in HOStockBatch and StoreStockBatch
All previous CRM, inventory, and transfer features still working correctly
